description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult male pedestrian with a realistic human physique. The figure is depicted standing upright with arms relaxed at the sides and legs slightly apart, suggesting a neutral, at-rest posture. The individual is dressed in minimal attire, wearing only basic undergarments and a pair of athletic shoes, with no visible accessories or carried items. The body is anatomically proportionate, with defined musculature and naturalistic limb positioning. The head is bald, and facial features are present but not highly detailed. The overall appearance is that of a generic adult male, suitable for use in urban simulation or crowd scenarios.
description: A standing adult male figure with a realistic build, minimal clothing, and athletic shoes, depicted in a neutral pose.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face, chest, and both arms and legs clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, torso, and limbs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back, shoulders, and backs of the legs.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the head, torso, and limbs from the opposite side.
